texto: she thought of the mix of kids in her class and in Melissa’s and she knew that the future could be bright. No one had tried to say she didn’t have a right to be in that school, or acted interested in who her ancestors were, but they had been interested in who she was and where she had moved from. They wanted to know what she did and wore and liked.

texto: till, silently￼without one peep, the angels come, their watch to keep.￼They'll hold you safe while dreaming deep. The pillow cool beneath your head,￼all star lit is your feather bed which glides the moonbeams like a sled,￼above towns which glitter blue and red.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dixie Dawn Miller Goode: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao.
